title: Tasks on PDF
excerpt:
Hi community, 
I’m looking for an app that allows me to mark tasks on a PDF using location data. The principle is the same as a map, but on a PDF. 
Any ideas?

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community,

I’m looking for an app that allows me to mark tasks on a PDF using location data. The principle is the same as a map, but on a PDF.

Any ideas?
